[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 0100101 3
2 1011110 5
3 0010010 2
4 1101111 6
5 0000001 1
6 1111010 5
7 1011000 3

01 10 0111101 5
12 21 1110111 6
23 32 0101000 2
34 43 1000000 1
45 54 1001101 4
56 65 1010011 4
67 76 0001100 2
70 07 0110000 2

02 20 1001010 3
13 31 1011111 6
24 42 1101000 3
35 53 0001101 3
46 64 0011110 4
57 75 1011111 6
60 06 0111100 4
71 17 0001101 3

03 30 1100010 3
14 41 0011111 5 match 0
25 52 0100101 3 match 1
36 63 1011110 5 match 2
47 74 0010010 2 match 3
50 05 1101111 6 match 4
61 16 0000001 1 match 5
72 27 1111010 5 match 6

04 40 0100010 2
15 51 1010010 3
26 62 1110110 5
37 73 1010010 3
